First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 AUTISM_MEDICAID_EVER Autism Sectrum Disorder - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 AUTISM_MEDICARE_EVER Autism Sectrum Disorder - Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 BRAINJ_COMBINED Traumatic Brain Injury and Nonpsychotic Mental Disorders due to Brain Damage - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met
